articles.title: Canada Prepaid Card and Digital Wallet Intelligence Report 2026-2030: $26.26 Billion Market Intensifies as Bank-Led Digital Propositions and Embedded Infrastructure Entrants Expand Competition
articles.snippet: The Canadian prepaid card and digital wallet market offers opportunities in expanding reloadable prepaid cards for everyday spending, enhancing embedded finance for B2B disbursements, and strengthening compliance and disclosure standards. With digital trends …
